'''Hishyim''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] covered by a vast desert, located in the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

It was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol station during the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
